title: hoya calycina subsp. calycina
intro: Hoya calycina subsp. calycina, also known as the Hoya Calycina or Waxflower, is a species of flowering plant in the Apocynaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hoya Calycina include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to aid in the treatment of fever and skin infections. Hoya Calycina can be prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, and it is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
